# truenas_pool (Data Source)

Fetches information about an existing TrueNAS ZFS pool.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_pool" "tank" {
  name = "tank"
}

output "pool_status" {
  value = data.truenas_pool.tank.status
}

output "pool_healthy" {
  value = data.truenas_pool.tank.healthy
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the pool. At least one of id or name must be provided.
- `name` (String) The name of the pool (e.g. "tank"). At least one of id or name must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `healthy` (Boolean) Whether the pool is healthy.
- `is_decrypted` (Boolean) Whether the pool is decrypted.
- `path` (String) The mount path of the pool (e.g. /mnt/tank).
- `status` (String) The pool status (e.g. ONLINE, DEGRADED, FAULTED, OFFLINE).
